name: Safety consequence
description: Safety consequence — manual engineering judgement (approved design dimension).
rubric: {"1": "Negligible safety consequence", "2": "Minor injury possible", "3": "Serious injury credible", "4": "Single fatality credible", "5": "Multiple fatalities credible"}

name: Network service consequence
description: Network service consequence — manual engineering judgement (approved design dimension).
rubric: {"1": "No network disruption", "2": "Local detour, minutes", "3": "Sub-network impact, hours", "4": "Key corridor severed, days", "5": "Strategic corridor lost, weeks+"}

name: Financial consequence
description: Financial consequence — manual engineering judgement (approved design dimension).
rubric: {"1": "Trivial cost", "2": "Minor repair budget", "3": "Material capital cost", "4": "Major capital + indirect cost", "5": "Severe whole-of-life / liability cost"}

name: Environmental consequence
description: Environmental consequence — manual engineering judgement (approved design dimension).
rubric: {"1": "No environmental effect", "2": "Contained, reversible", "3": "Local, remediable", "4": "Significant, prolonged", "5": "Severe / protected-area harm"}

name: Reputational consequence
description: Reputational consequence — manual engineering judgement (approved design dimension).
rubric: {"1": "No public interest", "2": "Local complaint", "3": "Regional media", "4": "State media / ministerial", "5": "National / inquiry-level"}

name: Likelihood of failure
description: Likelihood of failure — derived default from condition + structural adequacy (srv/lib/prioritisation.js deriveLikelihood); manual override requires a logged reason.
rubric: {"1": "Rare \u2014 sound condition, ample adequacy", "2": "Unlikely \u2014 minor deterioration", "3": "Possible \u2014 moderate deterioration or unknown", "4": "Likely \u2014 significant deterioration", "5": "Almost certain \u2014 severe condition/adequacy"}
